subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

It was great connecting at the conference, and thanks for following up.

We’d be glad to schedule a 30-minute call next week to explore potential partnership opportunities. Could you send over a few specific 30-minute windows that work for you (including your time zone) on Tuesday through Thursday? We’ll confirm one of those or propose the closest alternative based on our team’s availability.

On sharing direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: we don’t provide direct contact information externally. After our initial meeting, once we’ve clarified scope and potential fit, we’ll coordinate any senior-level technical involvement and make the appropriate introductions from our side.

Looking forward to hearing your suggested times.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
